'''Sam Davis''' (born 11 November 1998) is a professional [[rugby league]] footballer who plays as a {{rlp|hk}} for the [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship|Betfred Championship]].

He has previously played for [[London Broncos|London]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]] and the [[Super League]], and spent time on loan from the [[London Broncos|Broncos]] at the [[Coventry Bears]] in [[League 1 (rugby league)|League 1]]. Davis has also previously played for the [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]] and the [[York City Knights]] in the [[RFL Championship]]. He has spent time on loan at the London Broncos in the [[RFL Championship|second tier]].

==Background==
He is the younger brother of [[Matt Davis (rugby league)|Matt Davis]] who last played for the [[Warrington Wolves]] in the [[Super League]]. He attended Hastings High School and the well known rugby school John Cleveland College.

==Career==
===London Broncos===
In 2018 Davis made his professional debut for the [[London Broncos]] against the [[Barrow Raiders]] in the [[RFL Championship|Championship]].{{citation needed|date=March 2023}}

===York City Knights===
On 14 October 2021 it was reported that he had signed for the [[York City Knights]] in the [[RFL Championship]].<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=14 Oct 2021|accessdate=16 Oct 2021|title=York coach James Ford delighted to sign London Broncos hooker|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/york-coach-james-ford-delighted-to-sign-london-broncos-hooker/}}</ref>

===London Broncos===
On 15 October 2023, Davis played in the London Broncos upset [[Million Pound Game]] victory over [[Toulouse Olympique]].<ref>{{cite news|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/67105947|title=Championship Grand Final: Toulouse 14-18 London Broncos - Capital club back in Super League|work=BBC Sport }}</ref>

===Salford Red Devils===
On 9 October 2024, Davis signed a two-year contract with [[Salford Red Devils]] in the [[Super League]]<ref>{{cite web|website=Total RL|date=9 Oct 2024|author=Callum Walker|title=London Broncos hooker makes Super League switch|url=https://www.totalrl.com/london-broncos-hooker-makes-super-league-switch/}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://www.bbc.co.uk/sport/rugby-league/articles/cp8md22g832o|title=Salford sign Broncos hooker Davis|publisher=BBC Sport|accessdate=10 October 2024}}</ref><ref>{{cite web|url=https://salfordreddevils.net/salford-red-devils-sign-sam-davis-for-2025/|title=SALFORD RED DEVILS SIGN SAM DAVIS FOR 2025|publisher=Salford Red Devils|accessdate=10 October 2024}}</ref>

===London Broncos (DR)===
On 4 April 2025 it was reported that he had signed for [[London Broncos]] in the [[RFL Championship]] on [[RFL dual registration|DR]] loan<ref>{{cite web|website=Love Rugby League|date=4 Apr 2025|author=Ben Olawumi|title=Off-season Salford Red Devils recruit makes Championship return as dual-registration partnership announced|url=https://www.loverugbyleague.com/post/off-season-salford-red-devils-recruit-makes-championship-return-as-dual-registration-partnership-announced}}</ref>
